verses.2: After two days he will revive us.
verses.4: “Ephraim, what shall I do to you?
verses.5: Therefore I have cut them to pieces with the prophets;
verses.6: For I desire mercy, and not sacrifice;
verses.7: But they, like Adam, have broken the covenant.
verses.8: Gilead is a city of those who work iniquity;
verses.9: As gangs of robbers wait to ambush a man,
verses.10: In the house of Israel I have seen a horrible thing.
verses.11: “Also, Judah, there is a harvest appointed for you,
